item.sponge.name: Bath Sponge
item.sponge.description: Use near water. Attach soap for a deep clean (100%). Rinsing without soap only reaches 70%.
item.soap.name: Soap
item.soap.description: Attach to a sponge to reach 100% cleanliness.
dialog.title: Take a bath?
notification.clean: You feel fresh and clean! Friendship and Luck are increased.
notification.partial: You feel fairly clean, use soap for a cleaner feeling.
notification.dirty: You feel worked up and dirty! Speed, Defense, and Attack are increased.
buff.clean.name: Clean
buff.clean.description: You're fresh and clean! NPCs appreciate your hygiene. Friendship increases when talking to people.
buff.neutral.name: Neutral
buff.dirty.name: Dirty
buff.revitalized.name: Revitalized
buff.friendshipdebuff.name: Unclean
buff.friendshipdebuff.description: People find you off-putting. Friendship decreases when talking to NPCs.

config.ui-x.name: UI Position X
config.ui-y.name: UI Position Y
config.decay-rate.name: Time Decay Multiplier
config.tool-decay.name: Tool Use Decay Amount
config.luck-buff.name: Luck Bonus
config.friendship.name: Friendship Points (Clean)
config.dirty-friendship.name: Friendship Loss (Dirty)
config.speed-buff.name: Speed Bonus

config.bath-anywhere.name: Allow Bath Anywhere
config.bath-anywhere.tooltip: Allow bathing anywhere instead of requiring water source
